name: Provable Coordination for LLM Agents via Message Sequence Charts

description: arXiv:2604.17612v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Multi-agent systems built on large language models (LLMs) are difficult to reason about. Coordination errors such as deadlocks or type-mismatched messages are often hard to detect through testing. We introduce a domain-specific language for specifying agent coordination based on message sequence charts (MSCs). The language separates mess...
author: Benedikt Bollig, Matthias F\"ugger, Thomas Nowak
